invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$0.088且RSI跌破35，或融资费率Z-score回升至-80%以上（空头平仓动力减弱）。
invalidation.en: Invalidation condition: Price breaks below $0.088 with RSI falling below 35, or funding rate Z-score recovers above -80% (short covering momentum weakens).

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$1950且RSI跌破40，或融资费率Z-score回升至-100%以上（空头压力缓解），或BTC跌破$67500带动整体下跌。
invalidation.en: Invalidation condition: Price breaks below $1950 with RSI falling below 40, or funding rate Z-score recovers above -100% (short pressure eases), or BTC breaks below $67,500 dragging the market down.
